title: Claim a published ebook into the library
description: This verifies that a reader can open a claim page, claim the ebook, and see the book added to their personal library.

steps.description: Verify the ebook is added to the library
Verify the claimed ebook is available in the library

title: Reach the dashboard after signing in
description: A signed-in user can log in and arrive at the dashboard with their account overview visible.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the account overview is displayed

title: Create a new project from a template
description: This verifies that a creator can start a new ebook project by choosing an ebook type, selecting a template, adding a brief, and creating the project.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the project brief with a clear ebook idea
Verify the new project workspace is displayed

title: Create a new account and reach the dashboard
description: A visitor can register with valid details and be taken into the signed-in dashboard experience.

steps.description: Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify the account overview is displayed

title: Generate and approve an outline in the workspace
description: This verifies that a creator can generate an outline, review the proposed structure, make a change if needed, and approve it to continue the ebook workflow.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Edit the outline with a refinement
Verify the outline is approved and visible in the workspace

title: Publish an ebook from the workspace
description: This verifies that a creator can publish a finished project and see it transition into the published state.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Publish the ebook with a slug
Verify the project is shown as published

title: Restore a signed-in session on page load
description: A returning signed-in user can revisit the app and land on the dashboard without manually logging in again.

steps.description: Verify the account overview is displayed

title: Generate and enhance a section
description: This verifies that a creator can generate ebook content for a section, improve it with the enhancement tool, and keep the updated version in the workspace.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the updated section content is visible

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Chat with the strategist to refine the ebook direction

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
